misc.title: #ONEPIECE1178 I have to say I'm very pleased with how Oda has handled Imu so far. The reason I criticized Kaguya(Naruto)was that she appeared at the end and was quickly dealt with. With Imu, Oda devel
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1178 I have to say I'm very pleased with how Oda has handled Imu so far. The reason I criticized Kaguya(Naruto)was that she appeared at the end and was quickly dealt with. With Imu, Oda develops Imu quite early on, it just keeps better and I have high expectations.

misc.title: Did Saturn lose his legs during the war of the Void Century? When he died in the manga, we only saw his skull and torso. In the anime, they made a point of showing the skeleton had no leg bones. Could
misc.text: Did Saturn lose his legs during the war of the Void Century? When he died in the manga, we only saw his skull and torso. In the anime, they made a point of showing the skeleton had no leg bones. Could this be why Imu had granted him a spider-type Devil Fruit? It would be very similar to Ceaser's operations at Punk Hazard.

misc.title: Could Law’s immortal surgery, much like his heart operation, remove a portion of someone’s soul? This soul fragment, according to the Claíomh Solais lore, could be placed within an object - or even an
misc.text: Could Law’s immortal surgery, much like his heart operation, remove a portion of someone’s soul? This soul fragment, according to the Claíomh Solais lore, could be placed within an object - or even an animal! What if the Gorosei have done this, and this is why they can’t be killed!

items.title: Did Saturn lose his legs during the war of the Void Century? When he died in the manga, we only saw his skull and torso. In the anime, they made a point of showing the skeleton had no leg bones. Could
items.text: Did Saturn lose his legs during the war of the Void Century? When he died in the manga, we only saw his skull and torso. In the anime, they made a point of showing the skeleton had no leg bones. Could this be why Imu had granted him a spider-type Devil Fruit? It would be very similar to Ceaser's operations at Punk Hazard.
